task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'IT Support - Network Connectivity' shows headings for Symptoms, Causes, Diagnostic Steps, Solutions, and a table of diagnostic commands.

task_completion.description: Create 'IT Support - Slow Performance' with structured sections and performance metrics table

task_completion.description: Create 'IT Support - Printer Problems' with structured sections and error code table

task_completion.description: Create 'IT Support - Quick Reference Commands' with multiple tables for Windows and Linux commands

Each tiddler shows the 'IT-Support' tag pill.
Tiddlers contain clickable [[wikilinks]] pointing to other IT support tiddlers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox with TiddlyWiki open, with tiddler editing dialogs visible.
